case_title: PCA CONSULTING GROUP RESPONDENT VS. BRUCE J. STONE et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT STONE, BRUCE J. BRUCE STONE C/O STONE STRUCTURED PRODUCTS GROUP AS TO RESPONDENT PCA CONSULTING GROUP HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PCA CONSULTING GROUP RECOVER FROM APPELLANT STONE, BRUCE J. $4,344.66 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,532.66, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

STONE APPELLANT/DEFENDANT FOR $4344.66, $150.00 ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $38.00 COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (525)
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED.
